form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on March 30 over 390m at Ballarat behind Busting beaten 3.5 lengths (22.61). Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Ballarat over 545m. Last start finished last in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on March 24 over 460m at this track behind Super Batman beaten 16 lengths (27.01). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 525m at The Meadows last start. Prior to that was beaten 2.25 lengths over 525m at The Meadows in a Restricted WIN H. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Galloped on turning out of front straight and fell.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (25.69) over 450m at Ballarat. Boxed awkwardly and looks a each way chance only this field.
